tasks.name: Add Final CTA content configuration to homepage config
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript interface and content for final CTA section including headline, subheadline, and trust badge items

dependencies: Existing homepageContentConfig pattern with typed interfaces
constraints: Must follow existing config structure with interface-first approach
Trust badges must be typed with icon name and text properties

tasks.input_state: Config file exists with hero, sticky, features, testimonials, essentialReads, pricing sections
tasks.output_state: Config file has new finalCta section with interface defining headline, subheadline, primaryCta, secondaryCta, trustBadges array
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Config exports finalCta object matching FinalCtaConfig interface with all required fields populated

tasks.name: Create TrustBadges component with icons
tasks.purpose: Build reusable trust badges row component displaying 'No credit card', 'Free plan available', 'Cancel anytime' with checkmark icons

constraints: Must accept className prop for customization
Must be responsive (flex-wrap on mobile, nowrap on desktop)
Use semantic HTML with ul/li structure

tasks.output_state: TrustBadges component exists rendering array of badge items with check icons in a responsive row
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders 3 badges in a row on desktop, wraps on mobile, passes typecheck

tasks.name: Create GradientOrb component with CSS radial gradient
tasks.purpose: Build animated gradient orb using CSS radial gradients with multiple color stops for visual focal point

constraints: Use animate prop for breathing effect (scale + opacity oscillation)
Must respect prefers-reduced-motion (MotionConfig)
Size must be responsive via className prop

tasks.output_state: GradientOrb component exists with CSS radial gradient background and Framer Motion breathing animation
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders animated orb with scale 0.95-1.05 and opacity 0.6-0.8 oscillation over 4 seconds

tasks.name: Create FinalCtaSection container component layout
tasks.purpose: Assemble final CTA section with headline, subheadline, placeholder CTA buttons, trust badges, and positioned gradient orb

constraints: Must be full-width section with dark background
Orb positioned absolutely behind content
CTAs must be placeholder buttons (no handlers yet)
Mobile: stack CTAs vertically, scale down orb

tasks.input_state: GradientOrb, TrustBadges, and config exist but no FinalCtaSection component
tasks.output_state: FinalCtaSection component exists with layout structure, orb background, headline/subheadline, placeholder CTA buttons, and trust badges row
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders with all child components, passes typecheck, buttons exist but have no onClick handlers

tasks.name: Wire Start Writing Free button to sign-up path
tasks.purpose: Connect primary CTA button to existing sign-up route using pathsConfig

constraints: Must wrap Button in Link component
Button must remain visually primary (variant and styling)
Must preserve existing layout and styling

tasks.input_state: FinalCtaSection has placeholder primary CTA button with no navigation
tasks.output_state: Primary CTA button wrapped in Link navigating to pathsConfig.auth.signUp when clicked
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Button exists wrapped in Link component with href={pathsConfig.auth.signUp}
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -Pzo 'Start Writing Free[^<]*<\/Button>\s*<\/Link>' apps/web/app/(marketing)/_components/home-final-cta-section.tsx || grep -A2 'Start Writing Free' apps/web/app/(marketing)/_components/home-final-cta-section.tsx | grep -q 'Link'

tasks.name: Wire Book a Demo button to BookDemoOverlay
tasks.purpose: Connect secondary CTA button to existing BookDemoOverlay modal component

dependencies: useState hook for modal state management
constraints: Must use client component directive 'use client'
Must manage isOpen state with useState
Must pass isOpen and onClose props to BookDemoOverlay
Button onClick must call setIsOpen(true)

tasks.input_state: FinalCtaSection has placeholder secondary CTA button, BookDemoOverlay exists as separate component
tasks.output_state: FinalCtaSection is client component with state managing BookDemoOverlay, secondary button opens modal on click
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Clicking 'Book a Demo' button sets isOpen to true and renders BookDemoOverlay modal
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -q '"use client"' apps/web/app/(marketing)/_components/home-final-cta-section.tsx && grep -Pzo 'Book a Demo[^<]*onClick=\{[^}]+\}' apps/web/app/(marketing)/_components/home-final-cta-section.tsx

tasks.name: Add FinalCtaSection to homepage after blog section
tasks.purpose: Integrate FinalCtaSection component into homepage page.tsx after blog posts section and before footer

dependencies: Existing section spacing and container patterns
constraints: Must import FinalCtaSection at top of file
Must add section after blog posts section (line ~283)
Must use consistent spacing and containerBase classes
Must wrap in Suspense with SectionLoader fallback

tasks.input_state: Homepage has blog posts section as final section before closing div
tasks.output_state: Homepage has FinalCtaSection imported and rendered after blog section with Suspense wrapper
tasks.acceptance_criterion: FinalCtaSection renders on homepage after blog section, homepage passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -q 'import.*FinalCtaSection' apps/web/app/(marketing)/page.tsx && grep -A5 'Blog Posts Section' apps/web/app/(marketing)/page.tsx | grep -q 'FinalCtaSection'

tasks.name: Add scroll-triggered fade-in animation to FinalCtaSection
tasks.purpose: Enhance user experience with whileInView animation triggering opacity and y-axis translation on scroll

dependencies: viewport prop with once: true option
constraints: Must wrap main content in motion.div
Initial state: opacity 0, y: 50
Animate to: opacity 1, y: 0
Transition: duration 0.6s, ease easeOut
viewport: { once: true, amount: 0.3 }

tasks.output_state: FinalCtaSection content wrapped in motion.div with whileInView animation fading in from bottom on scroll
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Content has initial opacity 0 and animates to opacity 1 on viewport entry, animation triggers once at 30% visibility
